'''Uutkik''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]]<ref name="LOTJ">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/explore/visualguides/chp07.html|text=Episode IV Visual Guide — Chapter 7: Land of the Jawas}}</ref> and a member of [[Nebit's tribe/Legends|Nebit's clan]].<ref name="Episode IV" /> In addition to being a scout,<ref name="LOTJ" /> Uutkik was also an experienced [[Thief/Legends|thief]] who pilfered equipment and hijacked vehicles from unwary bystanders in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]],<ref name="Uutkik" /> a large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on<ref name="Eisley">{{DB|location|moseisley|Mos Eisley}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Tatooine">{{DB|location|tatooine|Tatooine}}</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Eisley" /> At one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="Uutkik" /> a major [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conflict between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="Episode IV" /> Uutkik stood near a [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]],<ref name="Uutkik" /> a treaded vehicle used by Jawas.<ref name="SWE sandcrawler">{{SWE|technology|sandcrawler|sandcrawler}}</ref>

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> on Tatooine, with other members of Nebit's clan,<ref name="Episode IV" /> Uutkik peered at<ref name="LOTJ" /> [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] from behind a rock wall<ref name="Episode IV" /> in [[Jawa Canyon]]<ref name="Location">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Tatooine: Jawa Canyon (Light)}}</ref> after the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was separated from his companion, [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].<ref name="Episode IV" /> Uutkik had [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and wore a brown [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]]. They were the considered to be the ugliest cousin of [[Het Nkik/Legends|Het Nkik]],<ref name="Uutkik" /> a Jawa member of the [[Nkik clan|Nkik Clan]].<ref name="swap">{{StoryCite|story=Swap Meet: The Jawa's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref> 

==Behind the scenes==
Uutkik first appeared in the [[1977]] [[original trilogy]] [[Star Wars saga|film]] [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].<ref name="Episode IV" /> While first given a name in the [[1998]] ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set for the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]],<ref name="Uutkik" /> the card did not specify if the character appeared in the film. Uutkik was later [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]]<ref name="Sompeetalay">{{Blog|teekay-421|90|Utinni: The scavenged Jawa roster!}}</ref> into a Jawa that appeared in the film through the [[Visual Guides|Visual Guide]] feature on [[StarWars.com]] on [[May 30]], [[2007]].<ref name="LOTJ" />
